title: Creamy Vietnamese Mars Bar Wrap
description: A spicy and energizing Vietnamese dish featuring Mars bar, wrapped in a corn husk, perfect for a unique dessert or snack. This dish is kneaded to perfection and is onion and garlic friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Knead the rice flour with a small amount of water until it forms a dough.
Wrap the dough in a damp cloth and let it rest for 10 minutes.
In a blender, combine the coconut milk, fish sauce, sriracha sauce, and sugar, and blend until smooth.
Add the heavy cream to the blender and blend until well combined.
Chop the Mars bar into small pieces and fold them into the coconut milk mixture.
Spoon the mixture onto the center of a corn husk.
Fold the corn husk over the filling to form a wrap.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes.
